div.p: Year three of Imperator Caesar Traianus Hadrianus Augustus. Work done for five days on the dyke works for the same 3rd year, Mesore 4-8, at the canal of Pholemis, on behalf of Theadelphia, by Demas, son of Heras and Tausiris, grandson of Petesuchos. Signed by me, N. N. Translation: P.J. Sijpesteijn – K.A. Worp, BASP 16 (1979) 132 Nr. 1
